strengths: 14+ years full-stack experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems—significantly exceeds 6+ year requirement with proven versatility
Strong testing and TDD philosophy demonstrated through workshops, testing libraries, and software craftsmanship practices across multiple roles
Currently building AI agent infrastructure with MCP code generators at re:cinq—directly addresses the specialized AI agent development requirement
concerns: Primary tech stack (Nest.js, React, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly demonstrated; background shows Ember.js and heavy D Language work, suggesting ramp-up needed on core tools
Cloud platform experience (AWS, GCP, Azure) unclear from resume despite infrastructure work mentioned; relational database depth (PostgreSQL/MySQL) not evidenced
Name-contact information mismatch (AISHA OKONKWO vs. Bogdan Szabo contact details) raises questions about resume documentation quality and attention to detail
response.justification: The candidate brings exceptional depth with 14+ years of full-stack experience and demonstrated software craftsmanship aligned with professional best practices. Current work on AI agent infrastructure with MCP directly satisfies a specialized requirement. However, critical gaps exist: the primary tech stack (Nest.js, React, Vitest, Playwright) is not demonstrated; experience centers on TypeScript/Node.js with Ember.js instead of React and significant D Language work. Cloud platform experience is unclear, and relational database depth isn't evidenced. A resume inconsistency (name mismatch) raises documentation concerns. Fundamentals are strong, but tech stack onboarding would be required.
